summary: Full-stack chatbot testing completed. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All major flows working correctly. Payment integration partially functional (Razorpay test keys invalid, Cashfree needs environment variable fix).

critical.issue: Cashfree return_url missing full domain - EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL not set in backend/.env, causing 400 Bad Request: 'order_meta.return_url_invalid'

minor.issue: Razorpay order creation fails with Authentication error - test keys are invalid
minor.note: Expected as per review request - using test keys rzp_test_kLsNFhJOwyFCPj

integration_issues.issue: Cashfree payment order creation fails due to backend return_url issue

action_items: Add EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL='https://chatbot-hub-57.preview.emergentagent.com' to backend/.env to fix Cashfree return_url
Optionally: Replace Razorpay test keys with valid ones if real payment testing needed
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded from all responses
✅ Environment variables used correctly (except missing EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL in backend)
✅ All React Native components used correctly (no HTML elements)
✅ All interactive elements have testID attributes
✅ Proper error handling with HTTPException and try-catch blocks
✅ JWT authentication properly implemented for admin routes

success_rate.frontend: ~98% (all flows working, 1 Cashfree payment issue due to backend)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created multiple TEST_ prefixed sessions (TEST_User, TEST_ChatUser, TEST_FreeOption, etc.) and questions (TEST_Question, TEST_Updated Question) for testing purposes. These can be cleaned up via admin panel.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment integration needs environment variable fix. After adding EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL to backend/.env, retest Cashfree payment flow. Razorpay will still fail with test keys but that's expected. All other features working correctly.

features_tested.sdk_init_screen: ✅ All mandatory fields (name, mobile, platform) and optional fields (email, channel, master, monitor) working
features_tested.chat_flow: ✅ Root question loads, options clickable, navigation works
features_tested.free_answers: ✅ Selecting free options shows answer directly
features_tested.paid_options: ✅ Selecting paid options shows payment required message and Pay button
features_tested.payment_screen: ✅ Payment gateway selection screen loads with Razorpay and Cashfree options
features_tested.admin_dashboard: ✅ Stats showing: 7 questions, 19 sessions, 0 paid payments, ₹0 revenue
features_tested.admin_questions_list: ✅ Questions page lists all questions with ROOT/category badges, free/paid counts, edit/delete buttons
features_tested.admin_add_question: ✅ Form loads, can add options with text, payment toggle, gateway selection
features_tested.admin_delete_question: ✅ DELETE /api/questions/{id} works, verified with 404 on GET
features_tested.admin_sessions: ✅ Lists all sessions with user details, timestamps, optional field display
features_tested.admin_logout: ✅ Clears token and redirects to login

razorpay.order_creation: ❌ Fails with 'Authentication failed' - test keys invalid
